scripts.prepare:native: mkdir -p vendor/node_modules; rm -rf vendor/node_modules/@zvec/bindings-darwin-arm64 vendor/node_modules/onnxruntime-common vendor/node_modules/onnxruntime-node vendor/node_modules/onnxruntime-web vendor/node_modules/sharp vendor/node_modules/detect-libc vendor/node_modules/semver vendor/node_modules/@img; copy_pkg(){ PKG="$1"; SRC=$(ls -d "node_modules/.bun/${PKG}"@*/node_modules/"${PKG}" 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -n1); if [ -n "$SRC" ]; then cp -R "$SRC" vendor/node_modules/; fi; }; copy_scoped(){ KEY="$1"; PKG="$2"; SRC=$(ls -d "node_modules/.bun/${KEY}"@*/node_modules/"${PKG}" 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -n1); if [ -n "$SRC" ]; then mkdir -p "vendor/node_modules/$(dirname "$PKG")"; cp -R "$SRC" "vendor/node_modules/$(dirname "$PKG")/"; fi; }; mkdir -p vendor/node_modules/@zvec; ZVEC_SRC=$(ls -d node_modules/.bun/@zvec+bindings-darwin-arm64@*/node_modules/@zvec/bindings-darwin-arm64 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -n1); if [ -n "$ZVEC_SRC" ]; then cp -R "$ZVEC_SRC" vendor/node_modules/@zvec/; fi; copy_pkg onnxruntime-common; copy_pkg onnxruntime-node; copy_pkg onnxruntime-web; copy_pkg sharp; copy_pkg detect-libc; copy_pkg semver; copy_scoped @img+colour @img/colour; copy_scoped @img+sharp-darwin-arm64 @img/sharp-darwin-arm64; copy_scoped @img+sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64 @img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64
scripts.build: bun run prepare:native && vite build && electrobun build
scripts.build:prod: bun run prepare:native && vite build && electrobun build --channel prod
scripts.python:test: uv run --project python --extra dev pytest python/tests -v
